description: Develop content strategy for revenue-generating topics targeting January (e.g. "improve your strategy", "improve your sales revenue").
Add UTM tracking to blog CTAs (sidebar, middle) for HubSpot/Salesforce attribution. Coordinate with Camille for HubSpot access if needed.
Implement UI fixes for blog - increase heading spacing/padding, adjust body font size for readability. Reference Ramp's blog for inspiration.
Update author profiles for blog posts - randomly assign from list of Firework staff instead of generic "Firework Staff".
Set up and begin tracking keyword rankings for new shoppable video and interactive video content. Clean up long-tail keywords for better monitoring.
